commit_scope: Add the first real GGUF tensor-math closure stone: a Form cell that resolves a named GGUF tensor to aligned data bytes, dequants real llama3.2:3b Q6_K bytes, feeds native dot/matvec math, and records the witness in form-cli status and the full composition receipt while keeping full token generation unclaimed.

ci_validation.notes: Local Mac proof is complete. Android hardware was not attached locally. Windows is represented by the existing workflow row and remains skipped on this Mac host until CI runs.

deploy_validation.notes: This is Form/runtime proof tissue and CLI receipt behavior; public web/API deploy verification follows merge only if deploy path filters trigger.

phase_gate.reason: The named real GGUF tensor math gap is closed and witnessed, but full real Llama GGUF token generation is still not implemented as one native path through prompt text, tokenizer arrays, all real tensor bytes, accelerator buffers, autoregressive token IDs, logits, and decoded text.

evidence_refs: Form-first reasoning was attempted through bin/form-cli ask; the body returned no grounded/sufficient hit for the exact closure question before rented orchestration began.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The native Form proof surface now composes named GGUF tensor lookup with real Q6_K weight dequant and dot/matvec math, and form-cli/full-composition receipts advertise and enforce that witness while still blocking any full real Llama token-generation claim.

sovereignty_receipt.rented_oracle_share: The patch design, integration sequencing, and evidence synthesis were produced by the rented frontier model after form-cli ask returned no grounded/sufficient hit for the closure question.
